enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs a casual day in Boulder, explaining why he spent the previous day cleaning his apartment instead of cycling. He reflects on the importance of a clean home for mental ease, discusses his sleep trouble, and plans a late-morning bike ride, possibly to Estes Park.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: A clean house takes priority over exercise because it enables mental peace and makes existing feel good
Better to sleep and recover than force a ride while exhausted and fail to complete it
Wants to vlog and ride every single day

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I did a Vila yesterday, so I want to do Vila every single day.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Yesterday's Vila was in the morning.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: After Vila, I planned on going on a ride but never did because I spent all day catching up on apartment stuff.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I was vacuuming a bunch of times and realized my vacuum was clogged.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I unplugged the vacuum and kept vacuuming.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I haven't even really started organizing, so I need to do that next.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I spent the rest of the day doing maintenance stuff like scrubbing my toilet and bathroom.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Cleaning my house takes forever.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Having a clean house is a priority over exercising because it makes it easy to just exist.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: You need to enjoy just existing if you're exercising all the time.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Doing less academic-type things means you need a clean house to give you satisfaction.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: A clean house gives you a quick variety of minds.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'll do more cleaning later on today.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I was really tired even though I didn't ride from the previous days.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I was hoping to get this thing done but ended up laying there all night tired.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: My rule of thumb was to get up at five, but I was still laying there.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I thought about getting up and riding anyways, even if exhausted, but then I wouldn't make it so I could sleep.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I took a melatonin last night and maybe I should take a real sleeping pill.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I ended up going to sleep before five and slept until like 11:30.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Now it's 12:30, and I had to do some errands.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: The plan is pretty crazy.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I didn't have much of a breakfast or dinner.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm not exercising, so my metabolism is low.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'll just bring a bunch of power bars and maybe get a meal somewhere.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'll just go on a ride and see how high in the mountains I can go.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: It might be raining, so I'll take a rain jacket.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm leaving at 12:35, maybe going to Esdys Park.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: This is gonna be the earliest that I've left since I started riding, so that's exciting.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm done talking and gonna upload this and get going with my day.
